mapper.select: select id, email, username, password, role, is_deleted, deleted_time, created_time, last_login_time, profile_picture_url, profile_picture_object_key, ielts_target_scores from sys_user where id = #{id} limit 1

select id, email, username, password, role, is_deleted, deleted_time, created_time, last_login_time, profile_picture_url, profile_picture_object_key, ielts_target_scores from sys_user where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0 limit 1
select count(*) from sys_user where is_deleted = 0
select count(*) from sys_user where is_deleted = 1

select user_id as userId, module_type as moduleType, paper_id as paperId, paper_title as paperTitle, sum(active_count) as activeRecordCount, sum(deleted_count) as deletedRecordCount, sum(active_count + deleted_count) as totalRecordCount from ( select lr.user_id, 'LISTENING' as module_type, lr.test_id as paper_id, coalesce(lt.title, concat('Listening Test #', lr.test_id)) as paper_title, sum(case when lr.is_deleted = 0 then 1 else 0 end) as active_count, sum(case when lr.is_deleted = 1 then 1 else 0 end) as deleted_count from listening_record lr left join listening_test lt on lt.id = lr.test_id where lr.user_id in
#{userId}
group by lr.user_id, lr.test_id, lt.title
union all
select rr.user_id, 'READING' as module_type, rr.test_id as paper_id, coalesce(rt.title, concat('Reading Test #', rr.test_id)) as paper_title, sum(case when rr.is_deleted = 0 then 1 else 0 end) as active_count, sum(case when rr.is_deleted = 1 then 1 else 0 end) as deleted_count from reading_record rr left join reading_test rt on rt.id = rr.test_id where rr.user_id in
#{userId}
group by rr.user_id, rr.test_id, rt.title
union all
select wr.user_id, 'WRITING' as module_type, wr.question_id as paper_id, coalesce(wq.title, concat('Writing Question #', wr.question_id)) as paper_title, sum(case when wr.is_deleted = 0 then 1 else 0 end) as active_count, sum(case when wr.is_deleted = 1 then 1 else 0 end) as deleted_count from writing_record wr left join writing_question wq on wq.id = wr.question_id where wr.user_id in
#{userId}
group by wr.user_id, wr.question_id, wq.title
union all
select sr.user_id, 'SPEAKING' as module_type, sr.question_id as paper_id, coalesce(sq.question_text, concat('Speaking Question #', sr.question_id)) as paper_title, sum(case when sr.is_deleted = 0 then 1 else 0 end) as active_count, sum(case when sr.is_deleted = 1 then 1 else 0 end) as deleted_count from speaking_record sr left join speaking_question sq on sq.id = sr.question_id where sr.user_id in
#{userId}
group by sr.user_id, sr.question_id, sq.question_text ) record_counts group by user_id, module_type, paper_id, paper_title order by user_id asc, module_type asc, paper_id asc
mapper.update: update sys_user set is_deleted = 1, deleted_time = now() where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
update sys_user set is_deleted = 0, deleted_time = null where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 1
